languages.original_text: "The abundance of plant life is assessed as a negative factor in the utility of the planet's surface to the Adeptus Mechanicus. Purification litany 145 followed by four blessings by fire is recommended."

languages.text: "Обилие растительной жизни оценивается как отрицательный фактор полезности поверхности планеты для Адептус Механикус. Рекомендуется литания очищения номер 145 и последующее четырехкратное благословение огнем".

"The abundance of plant life is assessed as a negative factor in the utility of the planet's surface to the Adeptus Mechanicus. Purification litany 145 followed by four blessings by fire is recommended."
languages.original_text: "Обилие растительной жизни оценивается как отрицательный фактор полезности поверхности планеты для Адептус Механикус. Рекомендуется литания очищения номер 145 и последующее четырехкратное благословение огнем".

traits.locale_text: "The abundance of plant life is assessed as a negative factor in the utility of the planet's surface to the Adeptus Mechanicus. Purification litany 145 followed by four blessings by fire is recommended."

"The abundance of plant life is assessed as a negative factor in the utility of the planet's surface to the Adeptus Mechanicus. Purification litany 145 followed by four blessings by fire is recommended."

"The abundance of plant life is assessed as a negative factor in the utility of the planet's surface to the Adeptus Mechanicus. Purification litany 145 followed by four blessings by fire is recommended."

languages.text: 「植物の繁茂は、アデプタ・メカニクスの観点から、惑星の表面の有用性に対する負の要素と見なされている。浄化の唱え145と火による4つの祝福が推奨される」
languages.original_text: "The abundance of plant life is assessed as a negative factor in the utility of the planet's surface to the Adeptus Mechanicus. Purification litany 145 followed by four blessings by fire is recommended."

traits.locale_text: 「植物の繁茂は、アデプタ・メカニクスの観点から、惑星の表面の有用性に対する負の要素と見なされている。浄化の唱え145と火による4つの祝福が推奨される。」

languages.text: « L'abondance de végétaux est considérée comme un facteur négatif rendant la surface de la planète impropre à l'usage de l'Adeptus Mechanicus. Je recommande la litanie de purification 145, suivie de quatre bénédictions par le feu. »
languages.original_text: "The abundance of plant life is assessed as a negative factor in the utility of the planet's surface to the Adeptus Mechanicus. Purification litany 145 followed by four blessings by fire is recommended."

traits.locale_text: « L'abondance de végétaux est considérée comme un facteur négatif rendant la surface de la planète impropre à l'usage de l'Adeptus Mechanicus. Je recommande la litanie de purification 145, suivie de quatre bénédictions par le feu. »

languages.text: "Die Fülle an pflanzlichem Leben wird vom Adeptus Mechanicus hinsichtlich der Nutzung der Planetenoberfläche als negativer Faktor eingestuft. Reinigungslitanei 145 gefolgt von vier Feuersegnungen wird empfohlen."
languages.original_text: "The abundance of plant life is assessed as a negative factor in the utility of the planet's surface to the Adeptus Mechanicus. Purification litany 145 followed by four blessings by fire is recommended."

traits.locale_text: "Die Fülle an pflanzlichem Leben wird vom Adeptus Mechanicus hinsichtlich der Nutzung der Planetenoberfläche als negativer Faktor eingestuft. Reinigungslitanei 145 gefolgt von vier Feuersegnungen wird empfohlen."

languages.text: "Bitki yaşamının bolluğu, gezegen yüzeyinin Adeptus Mechanicus'a faydası açısından olumsuz bir faktör olarak değerlendirilmekte. Dört ateşle kutsama işleminin ardından 145 numaralı arınma ilahisi önerilmekte."
languages.original_text: "The abundance of plant life is assessed as a negative factor in the utility of the planet's surface to the Adeptus Mechanicus. Purification litany 145 followed by four blessings by fire is recommended."

traits.locale_text: "Bitki yaşamının bolluğu, gezegen yüzeyinin Adeptus Mechanicus'a faydası açısından olumsuz bir faktör olarak değerlendirilmekte. Dört ateşle kutsama işleminin ardından 145 numaralı arınma ilahisi önerilmekte."

languages.text: «La abundancia de vida vegetal se considera un factor negativo en la utilidad de la superficie planetaria para el Adeptus Mechanicus. Recomiendo la letanía de purificación 145 seguida de cuatro bendiciones incendiarias».
languages.original_text: "The abundance of plant life is assessed as a negative factor in the utility of the planet's surface to the Adeptus Mechanicus. Purification litany 145 followed by four blessings by fire is recommended."

traits.locale_text: «La abundancia de vida vegetal se considera un factor negativo en la utilidad de la superficie planetaria para el Adeptus Mechanicus. Recomiendo la letanía de purificación 145 seguida de cuatro bendiciones incendiarias».

languages.text: “该行星地表繁茂的植被被评估为阻碍机械修会改造的负面因素。建议执行净化祷文145，随后进行四次火焰祝圣。”
languages.original_text: "The abundance of plant life is assessed as a negative factor in the utility of the planet's surface to the Adeptus Mechanicus. Purification litany 145 followed by four blessings by fire is recommended."

traits.locale_text: “该行星地表繁茂的植被被评估为阻碍机械修会改造的负面因素。建议执行净化祷文145，随后进行四次火焰祝圣。”
